summary: Good-quality recording featuring a nice rendition of Terrapin Station.
review: The reviewer rates the show positively, calling it a "nice pull of a good show" and highlighting a satisfying performance of Terrapin Station. The recording is described as good, though no specific details about source or clarity are given. Overall the release seems enjoyable both musically and technically.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive 4‑star review praising both the show (notably Terrapin Station) and the recording quality, indicating a solid performance with decent audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a good recording but provides no specifics on source type or sonic details.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; reviewer simply notes the overall show as good.
